query: SELECT u.name as gestor, l.nome as loja, l.numeroLoja FROM gestor_lojas gl INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id INNER JOIN lojas l ON gl.lojaId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Marco%' ORDER BY u.name, l.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT u.name as gestor, l.nome as loja, l.numeroLoja FROM gestor_lojas gl INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id INNER JOIN lojas l ON gl.lojaId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Marco%' ORDER BY u.name, l.nome;
